headline: Three Major Payment Rails Developments — Strategic Implications
summary:
**Key Alerts:**

• **JPMorgan Kinexis Scale** — Tokenized deposit volume reaches $1B daily, signaling institutional adoption of blockchain-based treasury solutions

• **TCH RLN Pilot Progress** — Regulated Liability Network advances interbank tokenized settlement, creating new competitive dynamics

• **Regulatory Clarity** — Federal Reserve issues supervisory guidance on bank stablecoin engagement, de-risking institutional participation

**Bottom Line for Treasury:** Tokenization is transitioning from experiment to infrastructure. Banks not actively building equivalent capabilities face client attrition among institutional and mid-market segments within 12-18 months.
